name: NASA Archive Explorer
description: Explore and download NASA open datasets — imagery, mission telemetry, earth science — with a local pipeline for private analysis.
author: Sean Campbell

data_streams.purpose: Remember searches you ran this session for quick re-run
data_streams.description: Search history deleted when session ends

data_streams.purpose: Store datasets and images you explicitly saved
data_streams.description: Kept until you delete it — lives in your local data/ folder

dev_server.note: Local dev proxy for the NASA oral-chat Supabase edge function. Not started in production.
